nav.sticky_bar.name: Sticky Nav Bar
nav.sticky_bar.purpose: Persistent wayfinding and an always-reachable CTA.

nav.mega_menu.name: Mega Menu
nav.mega_menu.purpose: Exposes deep information architecture without deep clicking. Merchandising surface.

nav.command_palette.name: Command Palette (Cmd+K)
nav.command_palette.purpose: Keyboard-summoned search and actions. Signals 'built for pros'.

hero.centered.name: Centered Hero
hero.centered.purpose: Zero-ambiguity value statement. Eye lands center, reads top to bottom.

hero.split.name: Split Hero
hero.split.purpose: Show and tell. Copy beside a visual proof point or an inline form.

hero.video_background.name: Video Background Hero
hero.video_background.purpose: Motion captures attention pre-cognitively. Conveys atmosphere and energy instantly.

hero.floating_product.name: Floating Product Hero
hero.floating_product.purpose: Hero-worships the product. The float implies lightness; the shadow implies dimension.

hero.minimal_type.name: Minimal Typographic Hero
hero.minimal_type.purpose: Confidence signal. Nothing to hide behind. Loads instantly.

hero.cinematic_scroll.name: Cinematic Scroll Hero
hero.cinematic_scroll.purpose: The hero is the first beat of a scroll-driven story. Enormous perceived production value.

hero.webgl.name: 3D / WebGL Hero
hero.webgl.purpose: Peak spectacle. Signals technical sophistication. Interactive equals memorable.

proof.logo_bar.name: Logo / Trust Bar
proof.logo_bar.purpose: Borrowed credibility. Recognizable logos short-circuit skepticism in under a second.

proof.testimonial_grid.name: Testimonial Grid / Wall
proof.testimonial_grid.purpose: Scannable, honest proof at volume. Nothing hidden behind a carousel arrow.

proof.results_cards.name: Case Study / Results Cards
proof.results_cards.purpose: Numbers convert. '3x booked jobs' beats 'great to work with' every time.

proof.video_testimonials.name: Video Testimonials
proof.video_testimonials.purpose: Face plus voice plus specifics. The hardest form of proof to fake, and the most persuasive.

features.bento_grid.name: Bento Feature Grid
features.bento_grid.purpose: Packs many features with visual rhythm. Cell size weights importance.

features.alternating_rows.name: Alternating Feature Rows
features.alternating_rows.purpose: Zig-zag pacing. Each feature gets room to breathe and be understood.

features.sticky_scrollytelling.name: Sticky Feature Scrollytelling
features.sticky_scrollytelling.purpose: Text steps scroll while a pinned visual updates to match. Ties explanation tightly to demonstration.

features.comparison_slider.name: Before / After Slider
features.comparison_slider.purpose: Instantly legible proof of transformation. Tactile and unarguable.

features.hotspots.name: Interactive Hotspots
features.hotspots.purpose: Tappable points on a product reveal detail. Rewards curiosity, explains spatially.

features.spec_table.name: Specifications / Comparison Table
features.spec_table.purpose: Hard data for the evaluating buyer. The rational close.

media.gallery_grid.name: Project / Work Gallery
media.gallery_grid.purpose: Show the actual work. For most service businesses this is the strongest proof they own.

media.video_showcase.name: Video Showcase
media.video_showcase.purpose: A produced film or product demo, presented deliberately rather than dumped in an embed.

stats.metric_band.name: Stat Band
stats.metric_band.purpose: Concentrated credibility in one row. Cheap, fast, high-trust.

stats.timeline.name: Timeline
stats.timeline.purpose: Milestones along a drawn line. Story, roadmap, or process.

pricing.tiered_cards.name: Tiered Pricing Cards
pricing.tiered_cards.purpose: Anchoring plus the compromise effect. Three options make the middle feel safe.

pricing.calculator.name: Pricing / ROI Calculator
pricing.calculator.purpose: The user talks themselves into the number. Reframes price as investment.

faq.accordion.name: FAQ Accordion
faq.accordion.purpose: Objection handling at the point of decision. Each question is a sales objection you neutralize.

form.lead_capture.name: Lead Capture Form
form.lead_capture.purpose: The conversion. Every field is friction; ask for the least that lets you follow up.

cta.banner.name: CTA Banner
cta.banner.purpose: Re-offers the action after you have made part of the case. Contrast makes it unmissable.

cta.final_screen.name: Final Full-Screen CTA
cta.final_screen.purpose: Last impression. The user who scrolled this far is warm — give them the clean shot. Peak-end rule.

cta.sticky_bar.name: Sticky Mobile CTA Bar
cta.sticky_bar.purpose: Always-available action. On mobile lead-gen this is frequently the single highest-converting element on the site.

footer.mega.name: Mega Footer
footer.mega.purpose: Wayfinding, trust, SEO internal linking, and last-chance conversion. Not a dumping ground.

footer.statement.name: Oversized Statement Footer
footer.statement.purpose: Ends on personality. The giant 'let's talk' email link is the agency signature.

utility.marquee_strip.name: Marquee Strip
utility.marquee_strip.purpose: A continuously scrolling band of text or logos. Cheap energy, conveys volume.

utility.preloader.name: Preloader
utility.preloader.purpose: Covers genuine heavy-asset load with a brand moment.

utility.custom_cursor.name: Custom Cursor
utility.custom_cursor.purpose: Branded pointer that reacts to interactive elements. Craft signal.
